summary: Frontend-only testing for Paint Shop bug fix. VERIFIED: Color selection NO longer affects page backgrounds. Page, header, and sidebar remain dark (#0f0f14, rgba(15,15,20,0.95), #111118). Color is properly scoped to truck preview container using background-blend-mode: multiply.
critical_code_review_comments: TruckPreview component correctly uses background-blend-mode: multiply for color overlay
Color is applied via inline styles on the preview container div, not global CSS variables
Page-level backgrounds use fixed dark colors (#0f0f14, #111118) unaffected by state changes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Paint Shop bug fix confirmed. All color selection features work correctly without affecting page backgrounds.

BUG_FIX_VERIFICATION.original_bug: Color selection applied to entire PAGE background

Color_Palette_Categories.details: All 6 categories tested: Classic, Blues, Reds & Oranges, Greens & Earth, Metallic, Special

Hex_Input.details: Custom hex #00ff00 entered successfully, updates color picker

Color_Picker.details: Native color picker input works correctly

Save_Design.details: Save button (data-testid='save-design-btn') visible, enabled, shows success toast 'Design saved!'

technical_verification.implementation_approach: Uses background-blend-mode: multiply on truck preview div
technical_verification.color_scoping: Inline styles on preview container only, no global CSS variables
technical_verification.conclusion: Bug fix verified - color selection properly isolated to truck preview area
